book-online.question: How do I book a villa online?
book-online.answer: On pamporovovilla.com open the Booking section, choose Villa 1, Villa 2, or Villa Deluxe, select dates, and submit the form. You receive confirmation by email. Questions: +359 879 501 660.

price-per-villa.question: How much does villa rental cost?
price-per-villa.answer: Prices are for the whole villa (up to 6 guests), not per person. Summer from €110/night for longer stays. Winter €120–160/night depending on length. Villa Deluxe has a small supplement. Current prices: Pricing section on the site.

price-includes.question: What is included in the price?
price-includes.answer: Whole villa rental, Wi‑Fi, parking, resort fee. Firewood for the fireplace — €10 per bag on request. Lift passes and meals are not included.

check-in-out.question: What are check-in and check-out times?
check-in-out.answer: Check-in after 15:00, check-out by 11:00. Late check-out is free when available — ask when booking.

holiday-pricing.question: Are holiday prices different?
holiday-pricing.answer: Yes — Christmas, New Year, Easter, and February half-term may have special rates and minimum stay. Contact us or check the calendar when booking.

min-nights.question: Is there a minimum stay?
min-nights.answer: Low season often has no minimum. Peak dates (December–January, February holidays) may require 3–5 nights. See the booking calendar for rules.

deluxe-difference.question: What is different about Villa Deluxe?
deluxe-difference.answer: Same layout — 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, fireplace, BBQ — with extra attention to detail and atmosphere. +€10/night summer and +€20/night winter vs standard villas.

max-guests.question: How many people can sleep in one villa?
max-guests.answer: Up to 6 guests per villa. For larger groups book two villas — contact us to combine.

payment.question: How do I pay for a booking?
payment.answer: Deposit and balance terms are sent on confirmation. We accept bank transfer; details arrive by email after your request.

cancel-policy.question: What is the cancellation policy?
cancel-policy.answer: Cancellation terms are in the Policy section and in your booking contract. We recommend travel insurance for winter reservations.

firewood.question: Is firewood provided for the fireplace?
firewood.answer: Yes — €10 per bag, on request before arrival or at check-in. Every villa has a wood fireplace in the living room.

pets-home.question: Are pets allowed?
pets-home.answer: Pet policy depends on season — please ask before booking. Unregistered guests are not allowed on the property.

distance-home.question: How far are the villas from Pamporovo?
distance-home.answer: 2 km to the resort centre and lifts — about 5–7 minutes by car. Address: Raykovski Livadi, Pamporovo, Bulgaria.

three-villas.question: Do I have to rent all three villas?
three-villas.answer: No — you rent one villa for your group. All three are at the same address but are separate houses with their own entrance.

vip-program.question: Is there a discount for returning guests?
vip-program.answer: Yes — VIP programme gives 10% off after three stays within one year, plus early check-in/late check-out when possible.

offers.question: Are there promotions and offers?
offers.answer: We publish seasonal offers (e.g. family ski week, stay 10 pay 9 nights). See Offers on the homepage or contact us for news.

where-is-pamporovo.question: Where is Pamporovo?
where-is-pamporovo.answer: Pamporovo is a resort in the Rhodope Mountains, Smolyan region, at about 1,650 m altitude. The nearest large town is Smolyan (~15 km). From Sofia it is ~240 km (3–3.5 hours by car).

pistes-length.question: How many kilometres of ski runs does Pamporovo have?
pistes-length.answer: The Pamporovo ski area offers 37+ km of marked runs for all levels — from green beginner slopes to black-diamond Stenata. Stenata is the resort icon and offers night skiing.

night-skiing.question: Is there night skiing in Pamporovo?
night-skiing.answer: Yes. Run #2 Stenata is lit for night skiing — usually 17:30–22:00 in season. Check the current schedule at pamporovo.me before visiting.

best-beginner-pistes.question: Which runs are best for beginner skiers?
best-beginner-pistes.answer: Run #6 Pamporovo (Tourist) is the longest and gentlest (3.3 km) — ideal for first descents. Green bypasses (#1A) and blue runs #7, #8, #10 are also good for families.

lift-tickets.question: How much do lift passes cost in Pamporovo?
lift-tickets.answer: Lift pass prices are updated each season. Current day, half-day, and weekly passes are published by official operators at pamporovo.me. Book accommodation separately — lift passes are not included in villa rental.

when-ski-season.question: When is the ski season in Pamporovo?
when-ski-season.answer: Usually December to March–April, depending on snow. Around 90% of runs have snowmaking, extending the season. Winter villa rental is most popular in January and February.

summer-activities.question: What can you do in Pamporovo in summer?
summer-activities.answer: Eco trails, mountain biking, horse riding, rope parks, mushroom and herb picking, cave visits, and authentic villages (Shiroka Laka, Gela). The region is ideal for family holidays outside ski season.

caves-nearby.question: Which caves are near Pamporovo?
caves-nearby.answer: Yagodinska Cave (~30 km), Devil's Throat (near Trigrad Gorge), Uhlovitsa, and others. Most require a guided tour — bring warm clothes and book ahead in peak season.

shiroka-luka.question: How far is Shiroka Laka from Pamporovo?
shiroka-luka.answer: The architectural reserve Shiroka Laka is ~20 km from Pamporovo — about 30 minutes by car. Combine with Rozhen Monastery and views from Rozhen peak.

where-to-sleep.question: Where to stay in Pamporovo?
where-to-sleep.answer: Choose between hotels in the resort centre and private villas away from the noise. Pamporovo Villa offers 3 private chalets on Raykovski Livadi — 2 km from centre, fireplace, BBQ, up to 6 guests per villa, from €110/night.

hotel-vs-villa.question: Hotel or villa in Pamporovo — which is better?
hotel-vs-villa.answer: Hotels suit short stays without cooking. Villas win for families and groups: whole house for you, fireplace, BBQ, parking, and lower cost per person for 4–6 guests. Pamporovo Villa is 2 km from the pistes.

villa-price.question: How much does villa rental in Pamporovo cost?
villa-price.answer: At Pamporovo Villa prices start from €110/night for a whole villa (up to 6 guests) in summer. Winter nights are higher by period. See current prices at pamporovovilla.com/#pricing or /rent.

villa-amenities.question: What is included when renting at Pamporovo Villa?
villa-amenities.answer: Each of the three villas has 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, fully equipped kitchen, wood fireplace, BBQ on the veranda, Wi‑Fi, and free parking. You rent the whole villa — no sharing with other guests.

fireplace-villa.question: Is there a villa with a fireplace in Pamporovo?
fireplace-villa.answer: Yes — all three Pamporovo Villa chalets (Villa 1, Villa 2, Villa Deluxe) have a wood fireplace in the living room. Perfect for winter evenings after the slopes or autumn weekends in the mountains.

group-villa.question: Can we rent a villa for 6 people in Pamporovo?
group-villa.answer: Yes. Each villa at Pamporovo Villa accepts up to 6 guests. Book one villa for your group or combine two for larger parties — call +359 879 501 660.

couple-villa.question: Is a villa suitable for couples?
couple-villa.answer: Yes — couples often rent a whole villa for privacy and the fireplace. You pay the villa price, not per person; for two it is a higher per-person cost but you get a private home.

distance-to-slopes.question: How far are the villas from the ski runs?
distance-to-slopes.answer: Pamporovo Villa is on Raykovski Livadi — ~2 km from the resort centre and lifts. By car you reach slope parking in 5–7 minutes. A free shuttle runs in season (check schedule).

parking.question: Is there parking at the villas?
parking.answer: Yes — free private parking by each villa at Pamporovo Villa. Convenient for winter skiing with equipment and for families with children.

how-to-book.question: How do I book a villa in Pamporovo?
how-to-book.answer: Online at pamporovovilla.com/#booking — choose villa, dates, and submit the form. Or call +359 879 501 660 / email pamporovovilla@gmail.com.

minimum-stay.question: Is there a minimum stay?
minimum-stay.answer: In peak season (Christmas, New Year, February holidays) a minimum of 3–5 nights may apply. Check the booking calendar or contact us for exact terms.

pets.question: Are pets allowed?
pets.answer: Contact us before booking — pet policy may depend on season and villa. Do not assume pets are allowed automatically.

wifi.question: Is there Wi‑Fi in the villas?
wifi.answer: Yes — wireless internet is available in all three Pamporovo Villa chalets.

winter-rental.question: Can I rent a villa for a ski holiday in winter?
winter-rental.answer: Yes — the villas operate year-round. Winter is the busiest season: fireplace, proximity to pistes, and a whole house for family or friends. Book early for January and February.

summer-rental.question: Is villa rental worth it in summer in Pamporovo?
summer-rental.answer: Yes — summer prices are lower (from €110/night) and the region offers eco trails, cool mountain air, and caves. The BBQ veranda and fresh air make villas ideal for family holidays.

drive-from-sofia.question: How do I get from Sofia to Pamporovo?
drive-from-sofia.answer: Motorway to Plovdiv, then via Asenovgrad and Smolyan — ~240 km, 3–3.5 hours. In winter bring chains or check road conditions in the Rhodopes.

snow-guarantee.question: Is there snow in Pamporovo every season?
snow-guarantee.answer: The resort has a powerful snowmaking system covering ~90% of runs. Natural snow is often available from December; operators maintain a base throughout the season for reliability.

restaurants.question: Are there restaurants near Raykovski Livadi?
restaurants.answer: Pamporovo centre (2 km) has taverns, pizzerias, and a supermarket. Villas have full kitchens — many guests cook or combine with dinners in the resort.
